name: jira
description: Jira issues and project context via Atlassian MCP server
notes: Minimal config — add auth details to .vscode/mcp.json after install. Required env vars: JIRA_URL, JIRA_USERNAME, JIRA_API_TOKEN (API token from id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens). Requires uv/uvx: https://docs.astral.sh/uv/
